insights: The market underwent a significant structural shift approximately 8 days ago, with job volume jumping from a ~1000 baseline to a ~1350 baseline, suggesting a seasonal hiring surge or a major influx of new graduate listings.
The 7-day average (1348) is significantly higher than the 30-day average (1088), confirming that the current momentum is sustained rather than a one-day anomaly.
While a minor cooling period is expected in the next week as the initial surge stabilizes, the overall trend remains positive as companies finalize their annual entry-level hiring quotas.
